revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required before production: (1) TIMESTAMP CORRECTION — 'Brands, bank, and new a month' appears at 01:43, not 01:00. Correct in trajectory_verdict.grounded_examples[0] and cherry_pick_moments[0]. (2) SEQUENCE CORRECTION in rep_intent.evidence[2] — Randy proposed tomorrow BEFORE Steve mentioned Monday; the reactive characterization at 05:19 inverts the actual sequence. Revise to: Randy initiated scheduling but failed to lock a specific time when Steve redirected to Monday. (3) SCHEMA LABEL FIXES — cherry_pick_moments[2] should cite button_up.phone_appointment_specified, not protocols.time_constraint; cherry_pick_moments[4] classification should be changed from 'knowledge_gap' to a scope/identity label consistent with setter_scope_discipline; cherry_pick_moments[5] should drop the bill_anchoring co-citation for the lease-preference moment at 01:22. (4) ADD MISSED MOMENTS — at minimum surface: (a) 00:23 sell-vs-lease opening question as a rebuttal_opportunity with schema-grounded alternative; (b) 01:27 self-sizing research as a verify.prior_designs signal for the handoff brief; (c) 03:09 Steve asking for Randy's email as a trust_building_micro_trades moment. Additionally: soften the corpus-comparative superlatives ('most self-qualified lead in the corpus,' 'rarest positive signal') to call-scoped language, and revise the handoff_brief.sensitive_topics_raised[1] tax-credit note to reflect that Steve said HE has already claimed his credits, not that the ITC is categorically gone — the closer needs the accurate framing.
